# discord_welcome_screen (Resource)

Manages the welcome screen of a Community Discord guild (a singleton per guild).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_welcome_screen" "main" {
  server_id   = "123456789012345678"
  enabled     = true
  description = "Welcome! Check out these channels to get started."

  welcome_channels = [
    {
      channel_id  = "456789012345678901"
      description = "Read the rules"
      emoji_name  = "📜"
    },
    {
      channel_id  = "456789012345678902"
      description = "Introduce yourself"
      emoji_name  = "👋"
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Server description shown on the welcome screen.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the welcome screen is shown. Write-only — Discord does not return it, so it is not refreshed.
- `welcome_channels` (Attributes List) Channels highlighted on the welcome screen (max 5). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--welcome_channels))

<a id="nestedatt--welcome_channels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `welcome_channels`

Required:

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel.
- `description` (String) Description shown for the channel.

Optional:

- `emoji_id` (String) Snowflake ID of a custom emoji.
- `emoji_name` (String) Unicode emoji.
